role: Root application shell and central state orchestrator for the projection surface: it fetches and parameterizes the meaning-space projection, chooses a responsive layout, wires cross-component window events, and mounts the gallery, tools, decisions, sessions, channels, board, transcript, source, and right-hand overlays.
capabilities: Classify form factor (desktop/portrait/landscape) from window dimensions
Publish computed form factor to body[data-ff] and resolve/apply modal allocation CSS vars
Create and distribute the shared SurfaceState object to layouts and overlays
Fetch projection with lens binding, space, embedder, MRL dim, quantization, relative centre, separator poles, time scrub, and rung params
Persist selected lens binding in localStorage and reset stale bindings
Tail live event stream via EventSource with throttled re-fetch pulse
Probe earliest corpus timestamp via one-shot EventSource
Manage relative centre (focusCentre) and two-pole separator state
Select/deselect projection points and dispatch projection:select with deduplication
Handle gallery:verb events for navigate, open-source, decision_take, and accept-update
Load territory/source record into the Source panel via /api/territory
Show verification-mode banner and suppress real writes/accepts when ?verify=1
Wire notice lifecycle through address/locus subscription
Install operator session, address capture, pointer bridge, and pointables on mount
Mount top-level faces: GalleryMount, SurfaceNav, DecisionsInbox, SessionDrill, ChannelView, BoardView, TranscriptView, ToolsBar/ToolsPanel, RightHand, SourcePanel
substance_why: The file implements concrete state, effects, API calls, event listeners, and renders the full layout plus nine top-level overlay components; only a few verbs and tool actions are explicitly stubbed.
interactions_present: Window resize/orientationchange updates form factor and modal resolution
Lens binding selection with localStorage persistence
Point selection/deselection and re-centre on a selected point
Live/freeze toggle for the event stream
Time scrubber that pauses live updates
Space override, embedder layer, MRL dim, quantization, nucleation params, rung, view mode, and motion feel selection
V verb actions: navigate, open-source, decision take, accept-update
interactions_missing: drive and generate verbs only show a notice, performing no real action
Tool Run/result is not wired (pending fork invoke + DNA tool-card)
Generic annotate (comment/reaction/favour) is deliberately not routed here
No retry or clear-error interaction on projection fetch failure
No direct UI in this file for pole picking or many param controls (delegated to child components)
gallery:rerender is only emitted on successful accept-update, not generically handled
performance_risks: A new SurfaceState object is created every render, causing all consumers to re-render
Projection refetch fires on many state dependencies without debounce
A live EventSource and a separate one-shot EventSource are both opened on mount
The 2.5s throttled pulse can queue bursts of re-fetches
No cancellation for fetchTerritory or fetchProjection beyond an alive flag
resolveAndApplyModal runs synchronously on every resize/orientationchange
Large projection payloads (limit 400-600 points) plus full re-renders of all overlay siblings on state changes
reuse_why: The orchestration semantics (projection parameterization, live stream, selection handoff, verb dispatch) are domain-critical and should be preserved, but the monolithic component that mixes data fetching, global event wiring, layout choice, and overlay mounting needs to be split into focused hooks/providers.
decomposition_hints: Extract useFormFactor and modal resolution into dedicated hooks
Extract projection fetch and live-stream logic into a surface data hook or store
Extract selection dispatch and gallery:verb handling into an event-bridge module
Provide SurfaceState via React Context to avoid recreating the object each render
Separate layout chooser from the overlay host
Extract Source panel data loading into its own hook
Extract verification guards into a reusable helper/wrapper
